data.title: Biophytis Completes €2.6 Million Private Placement
data.description:
An update from Biophytis SA ( (FR:ALBPS) ) is now available.

Biophytis SA has completed the settlement and delivery of a private placement valued at approximately 2.6 million euros. This financial maneuver involved the issuance of new ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants, which have been admitted to trading on Euronext Growth. The successful placement, facilitated by Maxim Group LLC and Invest Securities, is expected to enhance Biophytis’s financial position, potentially impacting its operations and market strategy in developing treatments for age-related diseases.

More about Biophytis SA

Biophytis SA is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing treatments for age-related diseases. The company operates in the biotechnology industry and is listed on Euronext Growth Paris.

YTD Price Performance: -43.43%

Average Trading Volume: 17,907

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €3.18M

data.title: Legacy Education Inc. Amends Executive Employment Agreements
data.description:
Legacy Education Inc. ( (LGCY) ) has provided an update.

On March 28, 2025, Legacy Education Inc. announced amendments to the employment agreements of its CEO, LeeAnn Rohmann, and CFO, Brandon Pope. Ms. Rohmann’s salary was increased to $415,000, with potential payouts tied to company performance. Mr. Pope’s agreement includes a $300,000 base salary and potential annual bonuses, with terms for severance and equity vesting upon certain types of termination.

More about Legacy Education Inc.

data.title: Reliance Infrastructure Completes Redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures
data.description:
Reliance Infrastructure Limited ( (IN:RELINFRA) ) has shared an announcement.

Reliance Infrastructure Limited announced the redemption and extinguishment of its Non-Convertible Debentures (Series 20E), following a settlement agreement with IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited. This action results in the withdrawal of enforcement actions previously initiated by the Debenture Trustee under SERFAESI, marking a significant step in the company’s financial restructuring efforts and potentially enhancing its financial stability and market confidence.

More about Reliance Infrastructure Limited

Reliance Infrastructure Limited operates in the infrastructure sector, focusing on the development, implementation, and operation of projects in power, roads, metro rail, and other infrastructure areas. The company is a part of the Reliance Group and is involved in various infrastructure projects across India.

data.title: Luokung Technology Faces Nasdaq Delisting
data.description:
Luokung Technology ( (LKCO) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 27, 2025, Luokung Technology Corp. announced that the Nasdaq Hearings Panel affirmed the decision to delist the company’s ordinary shares from the Nasdaq Stock Market, effective March 31, 2025. This decision follows a previous notification on February 11, 2025, where the company was found non-compliant with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b) and failed to present a viable plan to meet listing requirements. The delisting may impact Luokung’s market presence and investor confidence.

More about Luokung Technology

Luokung Technology Corp. operates in the technology sector, focusing on providing spatial-temporal big data processing and intelligent services. The company is known for its offerings in the fields of autonomous driving, smart transportation, and location-based services, primarily targeting the Chinese market.

Average Trading Volume: 54,372

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $10.52M

data.title: Cloudia Research S.p.A. Reports Robust 2024 Financial Performance and Strategic Growth
data.description:
Cloudia Research S.p.A. ( (IT:AGAIN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cloudia Research S.p.A. reported strong financial results for 2024, with a production value of 8.85 million Euros and a net result of 0.56 million Euros. The company continued its growth trajectory with significant international expansion, including the opening of a new office in Valencia, Spain. Notable projects such as ai4Sign with Microsoft and the HEASY project funded by the EU were initiated, highlighting a focus on AI for sustainability. The company also secured substantial investments from Algebris Investments and Eiffel Investment Group, reflecting strong investor confidence.

More about Cloudia Research S.p.A.

Cloudia Research S.p.A. is an innovative SME founded in Milan in 2016, specializing in the digital transformation sector with a focus on ERP, Cloud, and AI technologies. The company operates mainly in Italy, providing customized solutions to enhance operational efficiency through computerized and automated management systems. It has offices in Milan and Messina, with a training hub in collaboration with the University of Messina.

data.title: Sphere 3D Reports 2024 Financial Results Amid Strategic Transition
data.description:
Sphere 3D ( (ANY) ) has shared an announcement.

Sphere 3D reported its fiscal year 2024 financial results, highlighting a year of transition marked by strategic shifts following the Bitcoin halving event. The company focused on reducing costs, upgrading mining equipment, and moving towards vertical integration by launching its own infrastructure site. Despite a decrease in revenue from $21.9 million in 2023 to $16.6 million in 2024, operating costs were reduced significantly, resulting in a decreased net loss. The company also settled various legal and operational agreements, indicating a strategic repositioning in the market.

More about Sphere 3D

Sphere 3D Corp. is a cryptocurrency mining company focused on growing its industrial-scale digital asset mining operations. The company achieves this through capital-efficient procurement of next-generation mining equipment and partnerships with top-tier data center operators, while adhering to strict environmental, social, and governance standards.

data.title: Scana ASA Announces CFO Transition
data.description:
The latest update is out from Scana ASA ( (DE:1MP) ).

Scana ASA has announced a change in its executive team, with Torvald Ulland Reiestad stepping down as CFO and Morten Riiser, the current Vice President of Finance, taking over the role. This transition is expected to continue Scana’s strategic focus on value creation and growth, leveraging Riiser’s extensive financial experience to further enhance the company’s operations.

More about Scana ASA

Scana ASA is an industrial owner specializing in technology and services for the energy and offshore industries. With a history dating back to the early 1900s, the company is recognized for its leadership in technology and innovation, employing over 600 people and headquartered in Bergen.

data.title: Traws Pharma Announces CEO Transition and Investor Update
data.description:
Traws Pharma ( (TRAW) ) has provided an update.

On March 28, 2025, Traws Pharma announced the retirement of CEO Werner Cautreels, effective March 31, 2025, with Iain D. Dukes stepping in as Interim CEO. Dr. Cautreels will remain on the Board and transition to a consulting role, while Dr. Dukes, with extensive leadership experience, will continue as Chairman. The company is advancing its antiviral programs for bird flu and COVID-19, with an investor update scheduled for March 31, 2025.

More about Traws Pharma

Traws Pharma is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for respiratory viral diseases. Their investigational antiviral agents target difficult-to-treat or resistant virus strains, with product candidates including tivoxavir marboxil for bird flu and seasonal influenza, and ratutrelvir for COVID-19.

data.title: Critical Metals Corp. Eyes Major Stake Increase in Tanbreez Mining
data.description:
Critical Metals Corp ( (CRML) ) has issued an announcement.

Critical Metals Corp. has announced its potential increase in stake from 42% to 92.5% in Tanbreez Mining Greenland A/S, contingent upon a $10 million investment in exploration expenses over the next two years. This strategic move could significantly enhance Critical Metals’ position in the rare earth elements market, pending necessary governmental approvals and other conditions.

More about Critical Metals Corp

Critical Metals Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on critical minerals essential for modern technologies. The company is involved in exploration and development projects, with a significant interest in Tanbreez Mining Greenland A/S, which is a key player in the rare earth elements sector.

data.title: Ambow Education Reports 2024 Financial Results, Highlights Growth with HybriU Platform
data.description:
Ambow Education Holding ( (AMBO) ) has shared an announcement.

Ambow Education Holding Ltd. announced its financial results for the second half and full year of 2024, highlighting a significant improvement in profitability and revenue growth driven by the adoption of its HybriU platform. The company achieved full-year profitability, with a notable $1.3 million licensing agreement for HybriU in the fourth quarter, marking its expansion into international markets. Despite challenges such as the closure of Bay State College, Ambow increased its net revenues and gross profit while reducing operating expenses. The company is involved in ongoing legal disputes concerning leased property, which may impact its financial standing. Looking ahead, Ambow plans to accelerate the adoption of HybriU in the U.S. and international markets, leveraging its strong financial foundation and innovative AI capabilities to drive further growth.

More about Ambow Education Holding

Ambow Education Holding Ltd. is a U.S.-based, AI-driven technology company that offers phygital solutions for education, corporate conferencing, and live events. Through its flagship platform, HybriU, Ambow aims to revolutionize learning, collaboration, and communication by delivering immersive, intelligent, and real-time experiences across various industries.

Average Trading Volume: 78,726

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $7.48M
